title: Nursery Assistant Teacher (Three months / Central / Monday to Friday / 20 per hour) #HMS
description:
Temp Nursery Assistant Teacher (ASAP)

We are urgently looking for 1 x Temp Nursery Assistant Teacher with relevant early childhood experience to start immediately.

📅 Working Schedule

Three months
Mondays – Fridays

  • Now until 27 February: 7.15am – 11.45am

  • From 2 March onwards: 7.15am – 3.15pm

💰 Salary

  • $20/hour – Diploma in Early Childhood

  • If no diploma but relevant experience, pay rate negotiable (check with me)

👶 Job Responsibilities

  • Promote students’ well-being in collaboration with teachers and Junior School Management.

  • Supervise children in line with school behaviour and safeguarding policies.

  • Conduct student observations and provide constructive feedback to teachers.

  • Administer basic first aid and report any health or safety concerns promptly.

  • Engage children through meaningful play, supporting language development and critical thinking.

  • Support class teachers in planning, delivering, and reviewing developmentally appropriate activities.

  • Assist with daily routines, transitions, and classroom management.

  • Prepare and maintain learning materials and classroom resources.

  • Create and support a warm, organised, and engaging learning environment.

  • Support communication with parents on organisational matters when required.

  • Provide regular feedback to teachers on educational and pastoral matters.

  • Work collaboratively with colleagues across key stages.

🔹 General Duties

  • Support wider school activities as required.

  • Participate in team meetings and staff training.

  • Commit to ongoing professional development.

Interested candidates, do submit your resume to: jocelynchan@recruitexpress.com.sg OR telegram @jocelynchan

Jocelyn Chan| Consultant | Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Lifescience)

Company EA Licence number : 99C4599

Personnel EA License: R1331820

Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
